shotmap.note: Aggregated by fetching /event/{event_id}/shotmap for each match and filtering shots by player_id.

heatmap.note: Aggregated from /event/{event_id}/player/{player_id}/heatmap; x/y on Sofascore 0-100 pitch scale.

touch_positions.note: Sofascore public per-event raw touch positions were not used; heatmap is available per event instead.
